body.title: Wire consult into pe_chain at stuck points (SITUATE / preflight / implement-fail)
body.result: _maybe_consult_stuck helper + 3 hook sites (SITUATE-empty, pre-flight, close-loop attempt-2). Per-basket per-reason rate-limit. Additive only — original behavior preserved. 10 tests. 1b2238c5.
body.description:
Wire ConsultSession into pe_chain at three stuck-point escape hatches: (1) SITUATE returns 0 files, (2) pre-flight blocks on a test unrelated to the ticket's touched files, (3) IMPLEMENT fails twice on the same ticket. Each stuck-point builds a ConsultState bundle (ticket desc + pe_chain log tail + last hypothesis + failure reason), starts a ConsultSession, asks the initial question, integrates hypotheses back into pe_chain hypothesis block for retry.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py, tests/test_pe_chain_consult.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — three call sites + state-bundle builders + hypothesis re-integration. OUT — new pe_chain steps, changing escalate semantics otherwise, altering SITUATE filter logic.
**Test plan:** unit tests per call site — verify ConsultSession constructed with appropriate state, ask() invoked, hypotheses integrated into basket['hypothesis'] for retry path; same-stuck-point-same-ticket repeat rate-limit honored.
